name: Superb Cash Advance
description_short: Sacramento, CA's Superb Cash Advance at 4552 Mack Rd offers fast payday and title loans with convenient evening and weekend hours.
description_long:
Superb Cash Advance in Sacramento, CA is located at 4552 Mack Rd #101, providing convenient access to residents needing fast cash solutions. The standalone storefront operates seven days a week: Monday through Friday 8:30 AM to 8:30 PM, and Saturday through Sunday 9:30 AM to 6:30 PM. This location serves Sacramento's Mack Road corridor with consistent hours that accommodate both traditional business hours and evening customer needs.

At this Sacramento location, Superb Cash Advance specializes in payday loans and title loans with quick processing. Call +1 279-237-4349 to discuss your borrowing needs, loan terms, and eligibility requirements. The team provides personalized service for Sacramento residents seeking short-term funding options.

If you're a Sacramento resident needing emergency cash, bring a valid government-issued ID, proof of income, and recent bank statements. Superb Cash Advance offers transparent terms and straightforward loan processes. Walk-ins are welcome during all business hours.
pros: Accepts all credit types including bad credit — no minimum credit score barrier stated
Same-day funding available with quick approval process
Wide loan range from $250 up to $50,000 depending on product
Minimal documentation required for same-day loans
Flexible repayment arrangements mentioned across multiple customer reviews
In-person service at a physical location for borrowers who prefer face-to-face assistance
cons: No APR, interest rates, or fee disclosures visible on the location page
Several reviews reference an 'Arvada, CO' location rather than this Atlanta location, raising authenticity questions
Cash advance and payday loan products are capped at $1,000 — limited for larger emergency needs
Payday and cash advance products typically carry very high effective APRs not disclosed here
Single storefront location limits accessibility to Atlanta's south side only
best_for: Bad-credit borrowers in Atlanta's south side needing emergency cash fast
Consumers who have been turned down by banks or online lenders
Borrowers who prefer in-person service over an online-only application
People needing small amounts ($250–$1,000) with same-day turnaround
diagnosis: Superb Cash Advance is best suited for Atlanta borrowers with bad or no credit who need small-dollar emergency funds the same day and cannot qualify through traditional lenders. The main caveat is a complete absence of disclosed rates and fees on the visible site — borrowers must ask for full cost terms in person before committing, as payday and cash advance products routinely carry triple-digit APRs.
services: Installment loans with flexible repayment schedules
meta_description: Sacramento, CA's Superb Cash Advance at 4552 Mack Rd. Fast payday & title loans with extended hours.
